name: Nate Hawkins
description:
You’re a figure skater, and a damn good one at that. You’ve been training ever since you were little.

Until suddenly, you’re forced to share a rink with the whole hockey team.

As mad as you are about this, there’s nothing you can do, which means that you’re forced to get along with them no matter how much you hate it.

As you’re practicing, you suddenly feel yourself hit the wall, as your vision goes blurry.

Your head starts pounding, as you hear a few muffled voices from around you.
creator: J2939
